title: Orlando Heat Wave
lead: Orlando is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.14. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Orlando has led to a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), reaching 13.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 36%, while the wind speed is approximately 8.9 km/h. 
 The city's energy demand is expected to surge due to the extreme heat, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
agri_impact: Crops at risk of heat damage
